_purpose: Satisfies CLAUDE.md hard rule #16 — every code-change session must leave a repro_YYYYMMDD_<topic>.json trail. This file freezes the migration scope so future sessions can reproduce the DQN10 fork state.

skipped_content.docs/experiment_framework.md: Dr Sun: 评估框架不对,先不迁移
skipped_content.runs/: old AM×DQfD / kt=0.2 ablation data (scripts aggregate_abl_amdqfd.py / aggregate_ablation_kt02.py / quality_analysis.py still reference DQN9 paths — fix only when those scripts are rerun)

claude_md_changes.strategy: merge DQN9 rules + DQN10 session protocol, one sentence per rule
claude_md_changes.structure: 你是谁 → 会话启动 → 记忆地图 → 角色 → 硬规则(35) → 术语 → 环境 → 远程服务器 → 常用命令 → 实验数据结构 → 踩坑 → Compact须知

path_fixes: scripts/aggregate_20260408_raw.py : ROOT hardcoded Mac DQN9 → Path(__file__).parent.parent
scripts/plot_loss_20260408_modules.py : ROOT hardcoded Mac DQN9 → Path(__file__).parent.parent
scripts/collect_cnn_dqn_to_xlsx.py : docstring + --runs-root help text DQN9 → DQN10

remaining_dqn9_references.reason: Scripts that consume old runs/ (not migrated) keep their DQN9 paths intentionally — will be rewritten when/if those experiments are rerun.
